aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Air Tactical HVAC Services for local queries but miss broader HVAC topics due to limited conversational content.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content to cover more HVAC topics and common user queries.
Incorporate HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is not actively managed.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema for broader local SEO benefits.
FAQPage schema could be expanded with more detailed questions and answers.
No HowTo schema for instructional HVAC content.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Limited conversational content and topic coverage hinder AI citation for broader HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips, troubleshooting, and energy efficiency.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding HowTo schema and expanding FAQ content to address common HVAC issues.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the go-to expert through detailed blog posts and guides on HVAC topics.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by becoming the authoritative voice in HVAC services.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks conversational content and essential schema markup for broader HVAC topics.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement a targeted AEO strategy with expanded FAQ, HowTo schema, and authoritative blog content to capture AI-driven traffic.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expected 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, making it critical to act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your Path to HVAC Authority
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top HVAC authority in AI search.
page_title: Expert New York Heating Repairs: Air Tactical HVAC Services
